summaryAm: ቀበሮው የሚፈልገውን ወይን ሳይደርስበት ሲቀር ስሜቱን በእውነት መቀበልን የሚማርበት ቀላል ታሪክ።
moralAm: ያልደረስንበትን ነገር መናቅ ሳይሆን ስሜታችንን በእውነት መቀበል ይሻላል።

source.name: Aesop's Fables
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation focused on honest feelings.

pages.textAm: አንድ ቀን ቀበሮው በፀሐይ የተሞላ የወይን አትክልት ውስጥ ይጓዝ ነበር። ሆዱም ትንሽ ተርቦ ነበር።
pages.textEn: One day, the fox walked through a sunny grape garden and felt a little hungry.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A friendly fox walking through a sunny vineyard with warm storybook colors.

pages.textAm: በዛፍ ላይ የተንጠለጠለ ጣፋጭ ወይን አየ። “እንዴት ጥሩ ይመስላል!” ብሎ በደስታ ተመለከተው።
pages.textEn: He saw sweet grapes hanging high and looked at them happily.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The fox looking up happily at sweet grapes hanging high on leafy vines.

pages.textAm: ቀበሮው በቀስታ ዘለለ። ግን ወይኑ ከእጁ ትንሽ ርቆ ነበር።
pages.textEn: The fox jumped gently, but the grapes were just out of reach.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The fox making a gentle jump toward grapes that are just out of reach.

pages.textAm: እንደገና ሞከረ። እንደገናም ሞከረ። ነገር ግን ወይኑ አሁንም ከፍ ብሎ ነበር።
pages.textEn: He tried again and again, but the grapes were still too high.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The fox trying again with effort, still safe and playful, under high grape vines.

pages.textAm: ቀበሮው ትንሽ ተበሳጨ። “ምናልባት ወይኑ አይጣፍጥም” ብሎ ለራሱ ተናገረ።
pages.textEn: The fox felt a little upset and said maybe the grapes were not sweet.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The fox looking a little disappointed but not angry under the grape vine.

pages.textAm: ከዚያ ቆም ብሎ አሰበ። “እውነቱ ግን ወይኑን ፈልጌ ነበር። ስላልደረስኩበት ብቻ ተበሳጨሁ” አለ።
pages.textEn: Then he stopped and admitted he wanted the grapes but felt disappointed.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The fox pausing thoughtfully on a warm vineyard path, learning about honest feelings.

pages.textAm: ቀበሮው በቀስታ ተመለሰ። “ዛሬ አልደረስኩበትም፣ ግን እውነተኛ መሆንን ተማርኩ” ብሎ ፈገግ አለ።
pages.textEn: The fox walked away gently, knowing he had learned to be honest.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The fox walking away peacefully through the vineyard with a small thoughtful smile.
